name: Advance Car Title Loans
description_short: Advance Car Title Loans provides fast title-secured loans in Columbus using vehicle equity as collateral. Borrowers can access same-day cash while keeping their cars.
description_long:
Advance Car Title Loans operates a physical location in Columbus, Ohio, offering title-secured loans as a fast cash solution. The company uses vehicle equity (car, motorcycle, boat, RV, or commercial vehicle titles) as collateral to provide emergency funding. Their Columbus location maintains extended hours from 7am–9pm weekdays and 7am–8pm weekends to accommodate working customers.

The company offers multiple title loan products across different vehicle types: standard car title loans, motorcycle title loans, boat title loans, RV title loans, and commercial vehicle title loans. They emphasize a simple application process with friendly loan agents and claim to welcome applicants with bad credit or no credit history. Basic requirements include a vehicle title in your name, government-issued photo ID, and demonstration of ability to repay.

Advance Car Title Loans distinguishes itself by advertising a fast approval process and the ability to keep your vehicle while borrowing against its title. They promote convenient repayment options and position themselves as accessible to borrowers rejected by traditional lenders. However, the website clearly states they are a lead-generation platform connecting applicants to third-party lenders rather than a direct lender themselves.

Consumers should understand that title loans carry significant financial risk—failure to repay can result in vehicle repossession, and interest rates are typically very high. The footer disclaimer notes that some connected lenders may be tribal lenders subject to fewer regulatory protections. This product is structured for short-term emergency use only, not ongoing financial solutions, and borrowers should seek credit counseling before proceeding.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Extended hours (7am–9pm weekdays, 7am–8pm weekends) support working customers
Multiple vehicle types accepted: cars, motorcycles, boats, RVs, and commercial vehicles
Advertises fast approval process and same-day funding potential
Borrowers can keep their vehicle while using title as collateral
Stated welcome of bad credit and no credit applicants
cons: Not a direct lender—functions as lead generator connecting to third-party lenders with unknown terms and rates
Title loans carry high repossession risk if borrower cannot repay; vehicle could be seized
Website does not disclose APRs, fees, or loan terms, limiting transparency
Tribal lenders in network subject to weaker regulatory oversight than state-licensed lenders
Product poses significant financial risk and is only appropriate for short-term emergencies, not ongoing needs
best_for: Borrowers with vehicle equity facing genuine short-term cash emergencies
Those with poor credit unable to qualify for traditional personal loans
Vehicle owners needing fast funding and able to repay quickly without risking repossession
Consumers who understand title loan risks and have backup repayment capacity
diagnosis: Advance Car Title Loans is best for borrowers facing genuine short-term cash emergencies who own vehicles with equity and understand the repossession risk. The critical caveat is that this is a lead-generation platform connecting users to third-party lenders—not a direct lender—so actual terms, APRs, and fees are unknown and may vary significantly. Title loans should only be used as a last resort for temporary cash needs, never as ongoing financial solutions.
services: Ability to retain vehicle possession during loan term
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
